sections.label: Section 1
sections.title: Section 1 — Social Survival Texts
sections.contentHtml:
Questions 1–14 refer to the texts below.

Text 1 Central Library Membership Information

Central Library Membership Information

Welcome to the Central Library! To become a member, you need to complete a membership form available at the library reception. You will need to provide one form of identification, such as a passport or driver's license. Membership is free and allows you to borrow up to 10 books at a time. The library is open Monday to Friday from 9:00 AM to 8:00 PM, and on Saturdays from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM. Members also have access to free Wi-Fi and can use the library's computers. If you have any questions, please ask at the reception desk or visit our website at www.centlib.org.

Text 2 Post Office Services

Post Office Services

Our post office offers a wide range of mailing services to meet your needs. You can send letters and packages within the UK and internationally. We also offer express and special delivery services for urgent items. Our opening hours are Monday to Friday from 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM and Saturday from 8:00 AM to 2:00 PM. For those who need to send larger parcels, we provide packaging materials including boxes and envelopes for purchase. Additionally, our staff can assist you with registering or insuring your mail. For more information, visit us at 123 Postal Lane or call us at 555-0123.

Text 3 Fitness Class Schedule at Green Gym

Fitness Class Schedule at Green Gym

Join us at the Green Gym for a variety of fitness classes suited for all levels! Our weekly schedule includes Yoga on Mondays at 6:00 PM, Zumba on Wednesdays at 7:00 PM, and Pilates on Fridays at 5:30 PM. Each class lasts one hour and is led by certified instructors. Members can book classes through our mobile app or at the reception desk. All classes are free for members; non-members can join for a £5 fee per class. Please bring your own yoga mat and water bottle. For further details, visit our website at www.greengym.co.uk or call 555-9876.

sections.label: Section 2
sections.title: Section 2 — Workplace Texts
sections.contentHtml:
Questions 15–27 refer to the texts below.

Text 1 Hotel Front Desk Procedures

The front desk team plays a crucial role in the success of our hotel. The following procedures ensure smooth operations and guest satisfaction:

1. Check-in Process:
- Greet the guest with a friendly smile and offer assistance.
- Verify the guest's reservation by asking for their identification and confirmation number.
- Process the payment by accepting credit cards or cash, ensuring to provide a receipt.
- Hand over the room keycard and inform the guest of the breakfast hours and Wi-Fi details.
- Offer any additional services or inform about ongoing promotions.

2. Handling Guest Complaints:
- Listen actively and empathize with the guest's concern without interrupting.
- Apologize sincerely for any inconvenience caused.
- Offer a solution such as upgrading their room, offering a discount, or alerting the appropriate department to address the issue.
- Follow up with the guest to ensure satisfaction.

3. Check-out Process:
- Confirm the guest's departure date and prepare their bill in advance.
- Verify charges for room service, mini-bar use, and any other expenses.
- Thank the guest for their stay and inquire about feedback.
- Offer assistance with luggage or transportation as needed.

Text 2 Housekeeping Safety Procedures

Ensuring the safety of our housekeeping staff is a top priority. Follow these safety procedures to minimize risks:

1. Personal Protective Equipment (PPE):
- Wear gloves when using cleaning chemicals to prevent skin irritation.
- Use masks when working in dust-prone areas or when using sprays.
- Ensure non-slip shoes are worn at all times to prevent falls.

2. Handling Chemicals:
- Read labels carefully and follow manufacturer's instructions for all cleaning products.
- Store chemicals in a locked cabinet after each use and ensure it is well-ventilated.
- Never mix different chemicals; this can produce harmful gases.

3. Equipment Safety:
- Inspect vacuum cleaners and other equipment for damage before use.
- Ensure cords do not lay across walkways to prevent tripping.
- Report any faulty equipment to the maintenance department immediately.

4. Lifting and Carrying:
- Use proper body mechanics when lifting heavy objects; bend at the knees, not the waist.
- Ask for assistance if an object is too heavy to lift alone.
- Use a cart for transporting multiple items across rooms.

5. Emergency Procedures:
- Familiarize yourself with the nearest emergency exits in each area.
- Participate in all scheduled safety drills and briefings.
- Report any accidents or injuries to your supervisor immediately, regardless of severity.

sections.label: Section 3
sections.title: The Success of a New Netflix Documentary Series
sections.contentHtml:
A A new documentary series has recently achieved remarkable success on the popular review site Rotten Tomatoes, where it has received a perfect score of 100 per cent. This accomplishment has also propelled the series to the number one position on Netflix, indicating its widespread popularity and appeal among viewers. The series, titled 'The Dinosaurs,' consists of four episodes and is available exclusively on the Netflix platform. Its success can be attributed to the involvement of influential figures from Hollywood, who have contributed to its production and promotion.

B The documentary series 'The Dinosaurs' explores the fascinating world of these prehistoric creatures, offering viewers an in-depth look at their lives and environments. Through a combination of expert interviews, stunning visuals, and engaging storytelling, the series provides a comprehensive understanding of dinosaurs and their significance in Earth's history. The series aims to educate and entertain audiences by presenting scientific information in an accessible and captivating manner.

C The success of 'The Dinosaurs' on Netflix and Rotten Tomatoes highlights the growing interest in documentary content among streaming audiences. Documentaries have become increasingly popular as they offer viewers the opportunity to learn about a wide range of topics in an engaging format. This trend reflects a shift in viewer preferences, with more people seeking informative and thought-provoking content that goes beyond traditional entertainment.

D The involvement of Hollywood figures in the production of 'The Dinosaurs' has played a significant role in its success. These individuals bring a wealth of experience and expertise to the project, ensuring high production values and compelling storytelling. Their participation also helps to attract a wider audience, as viewers are often drawn to projects associated with well-known industry professionals. This collaboration between Hollywood and documentary filmmakers is becoming more common, as it allows for the creation of high-quality content that appeals to a broad audience.

E The perfect score on Rotten Tomatoes is a testament to the quality and impact of 'The Dinosaurs.' Reviewers have praised the series for its informative content, impressive visuals, and engaging narrative. Such positive feedback not only boosts the series' reputation but also encourages more viewers to watch it. High ratings on review sites can significantly influence a show's success, as potential viewers often rely on these scores to decide what to watch.

F In conclusion, the success of 'The Dinosaurs' on Netflix and Rotten Tomatoes underscores the appeal of well-produced documentary content. The series' achievement demonstrates the potential for documentaries to captivate audiences and achieve critical acclaim. As streaming platforms continue to expand their offerings, the demand for high-quality, informative content is likely to grow, paving the way for more successful documentary series in the future.
